explanation: Reordering and encoding the command-line arguments to avoid the '--headless' flag while still using 'powershell' in the command line. The Sigma rule may miss this because the '--headless' flag is not present.
Omission of the '--headless' flag by directly invoking 'powershell' without it. The Sigma rule may miss this because it relies on the presence of the '--headless' flag.
Insertion of the '-NoProfile' flag to modify the command-line syntax. The Sigma rule may miss this because it does not check for additional flags beyond '--headless' and 'powershell'.
